query: Can you check this codebase for any hardcoded API keys, SQL injection vulnerabilities, and see if our dependencies have any known CVEs?
expected_behavior: Agent recognizes this as a security scanning task and activates security-scanner
Agent runs scan mode (full codebase security scan)
Agent runs secrets-detector.py for API key detection
Agent performs SAST pattern matching for SQL injection patterns
Agent runs dependency-checker.py to analyze lockfiles
Agent maps findings to CWE IDs (CWE-89 for SQL injection, CWE-259/321 for hardcoded keys)
Agent presents consolidated findings with remediation
Agent never exposes actual secret values in output
